answer:
Yes, monday.com provides self-serve access to its GraphQL API for all users, including those on the Free plan [1][2].

While the Free plan for monday work management includes a daily API call limit of 1,000 requests, developers can access a dedicated, free-to-sign-up developer account to build, test, and experiment with the platform's API and SDK without needing a paid subscription [3][4][2]. Note that API usage is subject to complexity-based rate limits; for instance, free accounts have a 1,000,000 complexity point limit per minute when using the API playground [4]. Additional developer resources and documentation are available at the monday.com developer platform portal [1].
